title: The Age of The Sovereignpreneur Has Begun
summary: Jordan Urbs argues that AI and Bitcoin together enable "sovereignpreneurs", individuals who gain sovereignty over money, labor leverage, and their own time. He positions "bring your own agent" as the future of work and frames the combination of Bitcoin and AI as closing a technical gap for independent builders who can escape platform dependency.
